title: SonicPesa Webhook Dashboard Configuration — Owner Action

owner_evidence.source: Owner physical inspection of SonicPesa Webhook System dashboard and Admin settings

signing.format: hex digest of raw POST body bytes
signing.note: Set the same secret in SonicPesa dashboard and VPS environment (PM2/env). Never commit secret to git.

owner_steps: Copy the webhook signing secret from SonicPesa dashboard
Set SONICPESA_WEBHOOK_SECRET on VPS (Contabo PM2 env or deploy env file)
Trigger a test payment or use SonicPesa sandbox test webhook if available
Verify last_provider_webhook_at updates via GET /api/runtime/sonicpesa-webhook-readiness (admin token)
